verifiedBy: Coordinator — independent eth_getCode + admin/opsWallet/fee/adminRenounced read via mainnet.base.org, 2026-07-17
purpose: Deploy-any-contract factory. BNKR (or any agent that can only send normal txs) calls deploy(initCode) with to=this to CREATE any contract, sidestepping the creation-tx wall. Backs the deploy-any-contract Bankr skill.
notes: Deploys are permissionless + unpausable. Fee 0 at launch (native wei, admin-settable until one-way renounceAdmin). First real use: SongRevenueSplitter (song booth).
